_note: Secrets MUST NOT live in this file. The CI workflow injects ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, GITHUB_TOKEN, GSC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON, and HIGGSFIELD_API_KEY at runtime from GitHub Actions Secrets. Set them at github.com/<org>/<repo>/settings/secrets/actions.
